name: The scribes' room
description:
You have wandered into a large room, filled with assorted papers.  Elven
scribes wander to and fro, carefully writing out messages to be sent to their
cousins in Lothlorien, Grey Havens, and other places in Arda via hawk,
horseback, or by foot.  There is a small sign on one wall, printed with a neat
hand.
